description: Spice up your style with this fashionable yet spacious wallet from hidekraft. While it's well organised to allow you to carry all of your essentials conveniently, it looks absolutely fabulous with any casual outfit, upping your style statement.Dimensions: 11.5 cm x 9.5 cmMade of genuine leather for durabilityTwo main compartments with textile liningFive credit card holders with a flap, id card holder and an insert pocket on the left side of the walletTwo insert pockets on either sidesOne zipped pocket in the middle for coinsOne buttoned pouch to hold essentialsBranding embossed on the frontCareWipe dust with a dry, clean cloth
